CampusNotes V2

Why we built AI Chat.

"We kept uploading PDFs to Gemini/GPT just to learn faster.
It worked, but the workflow was slow. So V2 fixes that."

psychology
auto_awesome

AI Note Chat (Gemini + Groq)

Directly chat with your notes. Ask questions, get summaries, and find definitions without leaving the platform.

quiz

Ask from PDF

Stop searching (Ctrl+F). Just ask "What is the conclusion?" and get the answer instantly.

bolt

Instant Summaries

Get a quick overview of any document before you even start reading.

Master Your Studies in 3 Steps

Streamline the chaotic process of finding reliable study materials.

search

1. Search Smart

Filter by university, course code, or professor to find exactly what you need.
lock_open

2. Unlock & Learn

Get instant access to verified summaries, past papers, and study guides.
emoji_events

3. Contribute & Earn

Upload notes. Earn reputation points and premium perks as you help others.

Built for the Modern Student

We've stripped away the ads and clutter. Experience a platform designed for focus.

speed

Lightning Fast Search

Algolia-powered search finds relevant documents in milliseconds.

verified

Peer Verified Content

Every document is upvoted and reviewed by students.

devices

Sync Across Devices

Start reading on your laptop, continue on your tablet.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know.

check_circle Is CampusNotes free?

Yes! CampusNotes is 100% free for all students. No hidden charges.

cloud_upload How to upload notes?

Create an account, click "Upload Notes", fill details, and attach PDF.

shield Are notes verified?

Yes, verified by moderators to ensure quality and relevance.

Ready to Ace Your Exams?

Join thousands of students. Share knowledge. Grow together.

Get Started View All Notes
